Tests if converting the number 753 to a Number object equals 753.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the behavior of the `Number` constructor in JavaScript. It verifies that when the `Number` constructor is called with the argument `753`, it returns the numeric value `753`. This test ensures that the conversion from a number literal to a `Number` object and back to a primitive number is consistent and correct. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on this specific behavior of the `Number` constructor.
